title: It'S Not My Fault
lyrics:
[verse 1]
Mom put the cup right by my seat
It wobbled like a dancing feet
*splat!* went juice across the floor
Now I can’t walk out the door

[chorus]
It’s not my fault
It’s not my fault
I didn’t mean to spill at all
It’s not my fault

[verse 2]
The cup was full, it tipped too fast
*crash!* went glass—oh what a blast!
My socks are squishy, toes are cold
But I’m not bad, I’m six years old

[chorus]
It’s not my fault
It’s not my fault
I didn’t mean to spill at all
It’s not my fault

[ending]
It’s not my fault... okay, fine
I’ll grab a towel, make it shine
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, acoustic guitar and beatbox, 121 BPM, super bouncy, high energy, impossible to sit still, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
scene: The kitchen floor at 5:17 PM is slick with spilled apple juice, your socked feet skidding as you knock over the half-full glass Mom just set down—her sigh cuts sharp: "Who did this?" before your voice cracks, "It's not my fault!
cover_description: A kid in socks skids on a puddle of apple juice, arms flying, while a tipped cup spills.
